mnemonics: Modern AI is like a SMART Agent: Sensors, Model, Act, Reason, Transform
keyPoints: The 'Modern Approach' emphasizes intelligent agents that perceive their environment and take actions.
It integrates knowledge representation, reasoning, planning, learning, and perception into a unified framework.
This approach moves beyond isolated problem-solving systems to build general, adaptable agents that can operate in complex environments.
commonMistakes: Confusing the 'Modern Approach' with just machine learning; it is a broader framework that includes learning as one component.
Thinking an intelligent agent must be a physical robot; it can be a purely software-based entity like a web crawler.
